channel.title: Pablo on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Pablo on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Nginx - based stack
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: June 14, 2011.

I’ve been working on moving this blog to a different server, and simultaneously performing a migration operation on some other sites I spend time on.

In an attempt to do something new and to create an environment that provides some much needed flexibility, I’m putting some extra time and energy into selecting a server and technology stack. Here are the highlights:

item.title: Reading Log: Natural Language Generation by Genetic Programming
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: November 12, 2010.

Part of the “Today I read” series.

Today I read this paper:

“Language Generation for Conversational Agent by Evolution of Plan Trees with Genetic Programming” by Sungsoo Lim and Sung-Bae Cho. Link.

Anya was able to get this paper for me from NYU resources. It was a quick read. I had hoped for something that could apply to the Pablo project, but that was not to be.
